description: Faith tools for AI agents: cited KJV Scripture, ORA Q&A, sermons, churches, prayer & giving.
name: io.github.alansafahi/soapbox-faith

headers.description: Optional. Your SoapBox Faith Content API key as 'Bearer <key>'. Free read tools (verify_scripture, get_verse, lookup_strongs, find_churches, ask_ora, search_sermons, get_sermon, get_lectionary, browse_catalog, score_doctrinal_fit, synthesize_speech) need NO key. A key is required only for buying sermons, prayer, giving, and reading a user's faith context. Self-serve a key at https://soapboxsuperapp.com/developers.
headers.name: Authorization

title: SoapBox Faith
